parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "firstName": "{{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.firstName }}",
  "emailAddress": "{{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.email }}",
  "accountName": "{{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.companyName }}",
  "source": "Website Checklist",
  "status": "New",
  "description": "AI Readiness Score: {{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.score }}/20\nReadiness Tier: {{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.tier }}\nSource: {{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.source }}\nSubmitted: {{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.submittedReadable }}\n\nAnswered Yes: {{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.answeredYes }}",
  "cDealTier": "{{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.crmDealTier }}",
  "cUtmSource": "checklist",
  "cUtmMedium": "form",
  "cUtmCampaign": "ai-readiness-assessment",
  "cCurrentPainPoint": "AI Readiness {{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.score }}/20 — {{ $('Normalize & Score').item.json.tier }}"
}

={ "from": "AIandWEBservices ", "to": ["david@aiandwebservices.com"], "reply_to": "{{ $json.email }}", "subject": "New checklist submission — {{ $json.firstName }} {{ $json.score }}/20", "html": "

New Checklist Submission

{{ $json.firstName }}{{ $json.hasCompany ? ' from ' + $json.companyName + '' : '' }} just completed the AI Readiness Checklist.

Email{{ $json.email }}
Company{{ $json.companyName || '—' }}
Source{{ $json.source }}
Score{{ $json.score }}/20 — {{ $json.tier }}
Submitted{{ $json.submittedReadable }} EST

Questions answered yes: {{ $json.answeredYes }}

Reply to this email to follow up with {{ $json.firstName }} directly — their email is set as reply-to.

" }

={ "from": "David Pulis ", "to": ["{{ $json.email }}"], "reply_to": "david@aiandwebservices.com", "subject": "Your AI Readiness Score — {{ $json.score }}/20", "html": "
AIandWEBservices
AI Automation & Web Services
✓ Assessment Complete

Hi {{ $json.firstName }},

Thanks for completing the AI Readiness Checklist{{ $json.hasCompany ? ' for ' + $json.companyName : '' }}.

Your Score
{{ $json.score }}/20
{{ $json.tier }}

{{ $json.tierMessage }}

What Happens Next

I personally review every submission. Within 6 hours you will receive a follow-up from me with:

  • Specific recommendations tailored to your business
  • Quick wins you can implement this week
  • Whether a deeper audit conversation makes sense
Book a 30-min audit call →

Questions before then?

Reply to this email — I personally respond within 6 hours, usually in minutes.

David Pulis — AIandWEBservices

david@aiandwebservices.com • Miami, FL • aiandwebservices.com

" }

meta.description: v2: Added search-then-update logic before creating leads. Searches EspoCRM by email first. If lead exists (started checklist earlier), updates status to In Progress + appends score to description. If no lead found (edge case), creates new. Notify David and Confirm User fire from Normalize in parallel.
